title: Samsung opens ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex access after AI restrictions
optimized_headline: Samsung expands AI access with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex: What’s new?

raw_body:
Samsung Electronics is expanding employee access to ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, giving staff wider use of AI tools for technical and non-technical work. According to OpenAI, the deployment covers all Samsung Electronics employees in Korea and all Device eXperience employees worldwide. The DX division includes smartphones, consumer electronics, and home appliances. Samsung plans to use […]
The post Samsung opens ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex access after AI restrictions appeared first on AI News.
speedrun: Samsung Electronics is now allowing all its employees in Korea and worldwide Device eXperience division to access ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex. This move broadens the use of AI tools for various tasks, both technical and non-technical. By enabling these resources, Samsung aims to enhance productivity and innovation across its diverse product lines, including smartphones and home appliances. This shift highlights the growing integration of AI in workplace environments.
why_it_matters: Samsung employees can now leverage advanced AI tools, potentially increasing efficiency in their workflows.
This decision reflects a broader trend of companies adopting AI technologies to enhance productivity and innovation across industries.

lenses.eli12: Samsung is letting all its employees use powerful AI tools like ChatGPT and Codex. This is like giving everyone in a bakery access to a high-tech mixer that makes baking easier and faster. For everyday people, this means products might become better and smarter as employees use AI to improve their work.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this expanded access to AI tools could lead to improved product development and customer support. By enhancing efficiency, teams can focus more on innovation while cutting down on time-consuming tasks. This could result in faster product releases and a better user experience.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, Samsung's adoption of ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex could streamline processes across its Device eXperience division. By integrating these AI models, engineers can automate coding tasks and enhance customer interactions. However, the effectiveness will depend on how well employees are trained to use these tools.
